Local Library Extends Weekend Hours

The city library will stay open two hours later on Saturdays starting next month, the board announced on Tuesday. The change follows a survey in which weekend access was the most requested improvement among regular visitors.

Under the new schedule, the main branch will close at eight in the evening instead of six, and the two neighbourhood branches will match those hours on a trial basis through the end of the year. Staff will be added on Saturday evenings rather than reassigned from weekday shifts, the director said, so existing weekday service will not be reduced.

Library officials expect the longer weekend hours to help students and shift workers who have struggled to visit during the week. If attendance during the trial holds up, the board will vote in the spring on whether to make the extended hours permanent across the whole system.
